item.title: Same thing with the homeless, or the downtrodden. Some of them are veterans, some of them come from broken homes, some of them are in exile, and some with varying other reasons. I wish I had this wisdom and empathy when I was young.

item.title: 84% of a Delicious Manly Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
Steve Carrell on Jon Stewart when Stewart was awarded the Mark Twain Prize for American Humor.
Andrii Bondarenko https://instagram.com/andrii_bondarenko
Jeff Arcuri https://www.jeffarcuri.com/
Tom Holland's Lip Sync Battle, well worth watching the whole number: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jPCJIB1f7jk --- For more unmuted faves, just click on the #oodles tag. I did what I usually don't and included a few videos from previous oodles in here, because some things can't be posted enough. *wiggly eyebrows* You're most welcome, loves.
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Fuck the fascists
item.description: This was the market place of my home town Bremen a few hours ago. It's a demonstration against the German fascist nazi party AfD, which is gaining power at the moment. The demonstrations are everywhere across Germany right now and it feels incredibly good to see so many people taking a stand against the nazi scum :)

item.dc:creator: DrWalters

item.title: I am terrified
item.description: Went for a pretty routine eye exam. I have a condition on one of my eyes that I have been dealing with for a while. Couple days later I get a call from my doctor telling me to go to the ER immediately. A quick CT scan shows that I have a brain aneurysm in my optic artery. This was 2 days ago. I have been facing my mortality in a serious way. Today is my birthday.
item.dc:creator: ArcanisTheOmnipotent

item.title: Still have my creased up library card from the mid 1980s. I love libraries, no matter the era. I love the feeling of a solid paper book in my hands. Though one day, if they make only digital books, at least I will still have the ones I have.
item.dc:creator: SincerelyFroggy

item.title: Meet Pando, not a forest but a single tree. Every trunk of the Quaking Aspen is genetically identical & connected by a single 80,000 year old root system, making it one of the largest and oldest living entities on Earth! ?

item.title: Lodge's "Rust eraser"
item.description:
I got this for a few bucks because I was curious
There's not really any instructions so I decided they consisted of "Remove from packaging and rub on rust to remove"
I have this pan that I got for a few bucks... It's rustier than I want to deal with but not crazy.
You can see the outer coating coming off and resting on thr bottom. It took a BUNCH off on the first pass, but still plenty to go
I then proceeded to make my hand hurt taking up all the rust I could stand to take up
You van see the metal dust imbedded in the eraser to act as an abrasive. It worked up to a point then I was just grinding the eraser away and the job wasn't really done
You can see this out of order picture for the amount of rust it took off in one pass and how worn down the eraser is (a fair amount of rust for one pass)
closer still
This was it with seasoning spray (also from lodge) sprayed in because I couldn't convince the camera that it should focus on a deep dark pan bottom
and this is after I went over it with the stainless steel scrubby.
shape of the eraser after trying too hard. It is a good tool, I tried to get the pan to bare metal and that was an unrealistic expectation. It's a great tool for getting into little nooks and crannies. If it isn't the right shape run at it till the eraser is! Then hit it with another scrubby and finish up. I really liked how I didn't have to wet the pan to clean it at all, this stopped flash rust. I think it was well worth the $5 I paid for it, the suggested $10 retail price would be too much.
Here's a few photos of the cast iron after it was done in the oven.
I out like 4 layers on there at 450
I basically got it to 450 then stuck it in for 10 mins then pulled it back out and sprayed it again, then wiped it down and stuck it back in for another 10 minutes. Really the idea is to warm the house up, the cleaning and seasoning is just an added bonus.
I got like 3 of these in the packages with scrubbers and scrapers. You guys know the ones. I'm not a huge fan of Canola oil but the price was right.
item.dc:creator: Tetragonos
